channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mark Wahlberg Insists It’s ‘Hard’ to Gain Weight for Roles, Says It's 'Fun for About a Week'
item.description: The actor said it's harder to gain weight than it is to lose weight, saying it's "not healthy" to pack on pounds for roles

item.title: “Pulp Fiction” Actor Peter Greene's Cause of Death Revealed 2 Months After Being Found Dead in N.Y.C. Apartment
item.description: The star was known for movies like 'Pulp Fiction' and 'The Mask'

item.title: Ariana Grande Congratulates 'Unstoppable Friend' Cynthia Erivo on Her “Dracula” West End Premiere
item.description: Erivo’s one-woman ‘Dracula’ play opened in London’s West End on Tuesday, Feb. 17

item.title: Kate Middleton 'Privately' Expressed Reservations About Taking on Princess of Wales Title Associated with Diana
item.description: A new biography on the Prince and Princess of Wales reveals Kate's hesitancy

item.title: All About NHL Brothers Jack and Quinn Hughes' Parents, Jim and Ellen
item.description: Jim Hughes and Ellen Weinberg-Hughes' three sons, Jack, Quinn and Luke, all play hockey professionally

item.title: Shia LaBeouf's Behavior While Shooting New Movie Concerned Some on Set
item.description: Shia LaBeouf was arrested in New Orleans this week on two counts of simple battery charges ... and TMZ has learned some colleagues were concerned abou...

item.title: Michael Rubin Staffer Arrested at L.A. Home for Alleged Grand Theft
item.description: Michael Rubin's got an alleged crook under his roof ... or, at least he did, until she was hauled out of his Hollywood Hills mansion in handcuffs ... ...

item.title: Avan Jogia Helps TMZ Producer to Her Feet After Dramatic Tumble, on Video
item.description: Avan Jogia’s soooo ridiculously fine, he had our field producer Seleah Bussey falling for him -- literally (!!!) -- and yes, we got the dramatic mid-i...

item.title: ‘Pulp Fiction’ Star Peter Greene Died From Accidental Gunshot Wound
item.description: Peter Greene fatally shot himself ... TMZ has learned. The Office of the Chief Medical Examiner in New York City tells us Peter's official cause of de...

item.title: Rapper Lil Poppa Dead at 25
item.description: Lil Poppa -- a popular rapper based out of Jacksonville, Florida -- has died ... TMZ has learned. The Fulton County Medical Examiner's Office in Georg...
